info.name: EduSuite API — LMS Write Layer
info.description:
Test suite for all LMS write endpoints.

## Prerequisites
1. Apply the LMS seed block from `db/setup/04_seed_data.sql` — it adds one grade roster (`fd000000...001`) with two entries for DFDA 101 / Fall 2024. Folders 04–05 **will fail** without this.
2. Run folders in order — grade entry tests depend on the roster being in `open` state, which is consumed by folder 05.

## Workflow tested
The collection drives the full grade submission lifecycle:
1. **Folder 02** — Create course modules for DFDA 101.
2. **Folder 03** — Create assignments inside those modules.
3. **Folder 04** — Enter grades for Ron and Neville via PATCH.
4. **Folder 05** — Submit the roster (open→submitted), then post it (submitted→posted), which atomically writes two `sis.transcript_records` rows.

## Important: collection is not idempotent for the roster lifecycle
Submit and post transitions are one-way state changes. Re-running the collection after folder 05 completes will produce 400s on the submit/post requests, which is correct behavior. To reset, re-run the seed SQL to restore the roster to `open` status:
```sql
UPDATE lms.grade_roster_submissions SET status = 'open', submitted_at = NULL, posted_at = NULL WHERE id = 'fd000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001';
UPDATE lms.grade_roster_entries SET final_letter_grade = 'NG', final_quality_points = NULL, final_percentage = NULL, is_incomplete = false, is_excused = false WHERE roster_id = 'fd000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001';
DELETE FROM sis.transcript_records WHERE term_id = 'f3000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001' AND student_id IN ('f2000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001', 'f2000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002');
```

## Tenant
All requests use **Hogwarts School** (`hogwarts.edu`) — `admin_hogwarts` / `password`.

exec: console.log('✅ Logged in — LMS write layer tests starting');
if (dfda) console.log('✅ DFDA 101 found:', dfda.course_subject, dfda.course_number);

item.name: POST modules — Unit 1: Introduction to Dark Arts Defence
POST assignments — Essay: Dark Creature Field Guide

exec: if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('module_id')) { throw new Error('module_id not set — run folder 02 first'); }

body.raw:
{
  "module_id": "{{module_id}}",
  "title": "Essay: Dark Creature Field Guide",
  "description": "Write a 1500-word field guide on three dark creatures covered in Unit 1.",
  "assignment_type": "essay",
  "category": "summative",
  "max_score": 100.0,
  "due_date": "2024-10-15T23:59:00Z",
  "allow_late_submissions": true,
  "is_published": true
}

exec: console.log('✅ DFDA 101 section exists — grade roster should be seeded');

item.name: PATCH grade entry — Ron: A (92%, 4.0 QP)
PATCH grade entry — Neville: B+ (88%, 3.3 QP)
PATCH grade entry — Ron: update to A+ (re-grade, should succeed)
PATCH grade entry — Ron: set excused (clears grade)
PATCH grade entry — Ron: restore A+ (clear excused, re-grade)

exec: console.log('Ron restored to A+ — roster ready to submit');

item.name: PATCH grade entry — 400 empty request body
PATCH grade entry — 400 letter grade too long

exec: console.log('✅ Roster submitted — entry count:', b.entry_count);

item.name: POST /post — transition submitted → posted (writes transcript records)

exec: console.log('✅ Roster posted — transcript records written:', b.transcript_records_written);

item.name: PATCH grade entry — 400 roster is posted (locked)

exec: console.log('✅ Confirmed: cannot update grade entries on a posted roster');

item.name: POST /submit — 404 no roster for unknown ID
POST /post — 404 no roster for unknown ID

exec: // NOTE: To test the ungraded-entry submit guard:
// 1. Seed a second grade_roster_submissions row with status 'open'
// 2. Seed a grade_roster_entries row with no grade/incomplete/excused
// 3. POST /submit on that roster → expect 400 with 'entries without an outcome'
// This test documents the behavior; the full test requires an additional seed row.
console.log('POT 101 section check — no roster seeded here (expected)');
console.log('✅ LMS write layer collection complete. Session revoked.');
